news.t: Rising Active ETF TSPA Up Half a Billion in AUM in May
ETF Sequels: The Godfather Part II of New Launches?
This Fundamental Active ETF Is Spiking Ahead of Key Milestone
TSPA: Capturing the 2026 AI Infrastructure Boom
Karrie Gordon from The Active ETF Channel Announces Publication of "Active ETFs Gain Further Momentum in 2025"

holdings.infoBox: TSPA is an equity ETF with a total of 317 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.92%, Apple at 6.55%, Microsoft at 4.79%, Amazon.com at 4.32%, and Alphabet at 3.71%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price U.S. Equity Research ETF (TSPA) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 3509.79m in AUM and 327 holdings. TSPA is an actively-managed, non-transparent fund that seeks long-term capital growth by investing in US-listed companies selected and weighted similar to the S&P 500 Index The fund utilizes the T TSPA was launched on Jun 8, 2021 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: ETF Sequels: The Godfather Part II of New Launches?
data.text: The pace of innovation in the ETF industry is hitting breakneck speeds. We have already seen more than 450 new launches in 2026, part of a massive wave of fresh products testing the waters.
